title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Smartworks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Smartworks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Smartworks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Smartworks:
Smartworks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartworks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
